prompt: Show enrollment trends by department over academic years

inputData.question: Show enrollment trends by department over academic years

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show enrollment trends by department over academic years"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show enrollment trends by department over academic years"},"startedAt":1771804233613,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Aggregate enrollments per department and academic year by joining enrollments -> course_sections -> courses -> departments, counting active enrollments. Results ordered deterministically by department code then academic year.","sql":"WITH dept_year_enrollments AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.code AS department_code,
    d.name AS department_name,
    cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
    COUNT(e.id) AS enrollments_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  WHERE e.is_active = true
  GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name, cs.academic_year
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_code,
  department_name,
  academic_year,
  enrollments_count
FROM dept_year_enrollments
ORDER BY department_code ASC, academic_year ASC;","assumptions":["Count only active enrollments (e.is_active = true) to represent current/valid enrollments; change or remove this filter if you want to include withdrawn/inactive enrollments."]},"endedAt":1771804261210},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH dept_year_enrollments AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.code AS department_code,
    d.name AS department_name,
    cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
    COUNT(e.id) AS enrollments_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  WHERE e.is_active = true
  GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name, cs.academic_year
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_code,
  department_name,
  academic_year,
  enrollments_count
FROM dept_year_enrollments
ORDER BY department_code ASC, academic_year ASC;"},"startedAt":1771804261212,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"WITH dept_year_enrollments AS (

    d.id AS department_id,
    d.code AS department_code,
    d.name AS department_name,
    cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
    COUNT(e.id) AS enrollments_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  WHERE e.is_active = true
  GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name, cs.academic_year
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_code,
  department_name,
  academic_year,
  enrollments_count
FROM dept_year_enrollments
ORDER BY department_code ASC, academic_year data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Enrollment trends by department over academic years

resultRaw.sql:
WITH dept_year_enrollments AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.code AS department_code,
    d.name AS department_name,
    cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
    COUNT(e.id) AS enrollments_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  WHERE e.is_active = true
  GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name, cs.academic_year
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_code,
  department_name,
  academic_year,
  enrollments_count
FROM dept_year_enrollments
ORDER BY department_code ASC, academic_year ASC;

visualization.title: Enrollment trends by department over academic years

result.sql:
WITH dept_year_enrollments AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.code AS department_code,
    d.name AS department_name,
    cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
    COUNT(e.id) AS enrollments_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  WHERE e.is_active = true
  GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name, cs.academic_year
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_code,
  department_name,
  academic_year,
  enrollments_count
FROM dept_year_enrollments
ORDER BY department_code ASC, academic_year ASC;
